title: erigeron fasciculatus
intro: Erigeron fasciculatus, also known as the bottlebrush daisy or prairie fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Erigeron fasciculatus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues. Erigeron fasciculatus can be prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
